arts.ttl: Arsenal Predicted Lineup vs. AS Monaco: Champions League
arts.sum: Arsenal hosts AS Monaco in the Champions League looking to collect three more points.

arts.ttl: Bid rejected: Arsenal make the right call after Euro giants’ low-ball offer
arts.sum: Arsenal have reportedly rejected a transfer bid from Napoli for Polish defender Jakub Kiwior as we edge closer to January. Although the transfer window hasn’t opened yet, it seems there is strong interest in Kiwior, who has struggled to establish himself as a regular starter during his time at the Emirates Stadium. As many as […] The post Bid rejected: Arsenal make the right call after Euro giants’ low-ball offer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Gabriel, Calafiori, Timber, Partey - Arsenal injury news and return dates
arts.sum: In terms of the more minor injury concerns, Gabriel Magalhaes and Riccardo Calafiori have missed the last two games and are still yet to return to training. With that duo missing from Tuesday's session, they were seemingly joined indoors by Thomas Partey and Jurrien Timber with Arteta's most recent full-back pair not spotted out on the grass at London Colney.

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal keen on Vlahovic in January
arts.sum: Arsenal are eyeing a possible move for Juventus' Dušan Vlahovic in January. Transfer Talk has the latest news, gossip and rumors.

arts.ttl: I played for Arsenal and Liverpool - Saliba can surpass Van Dijk legacy
arts.sum: "If William Saliba continues on the trajectory that he's on already, then there's no reason why he can't overtake Virgil van Dijk, in terms of ability," he told Mega Dice . Former Arsenal and Liverpool winger Jermaine Pennant has delivered a huge William Saliba claim in the ongoing Virgil van Dijk debate.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star Declan Rice hails Premier League rival as 'different class'
arts.sum: Declan Rice heaped praise on West Ham captain Jarrod Bowen following his performance and late winner against Wolves, a much-needed result for manager Julen Lopetegui
